trades.reasoning: Top score of 100 with all bullish signals firing — RSI in momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, and a volume surge above 1.5x average confirming institutional interest.
Score 95 with clean MACD crossover and RSI in bullish zone; Verizon offers defensive telecom exposure to diversify a tech-heavy portfolio.
Score 95 with RSI 61, MACD bullish crossover, and price comfortably above SMA-20 — solid momentum without overbought risk.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today with the S&P 500 and NASDAQ both down fractionally — a neutral backdrop that doesn't justify sitting on idle cash. With 5 open slots and $1,173 available, deploying into the top momentum candidates makes sense. Chose MANE as the standout (score 100 with volume confirmation), VZ for defensive diversification away from our tech-heavy book, and TXG for clean mid-cap momentum. No existing positions appear to have triggered stop-loss or profit targets today.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted sideways on Monday, with the S&P 500 and NASDAQ each slipping less than 0.2% in low-conviction trading. The muted session reflects an ongoing wait-and-see posture among investors ahead of a busy week of earnings reports from major tech companies. In the absence of a clear catalyst, market participants are rotating into defensive names — notably telecom and utility stocks — while trimming exposure to extended growth plays.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週一在低成交量下窄幅盤整，標普500與那斯達克指數跌幅均不足0.2%，整體氣氛審慎觀望。市場焦點轉向本週即將公布財報的大型科技股，投資人在結果明朗前傾向按兵不動。資金流向方面，電信及公用事業等防禦性板塊出現小幅輪動，對估值偏高的成長股則有適度獲利了結跡象。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks showing strong recent price and volume trends, on the theory that assets moving upward tend to keep moving upward for a period. Traders use indicators like RSI (Relative Strength Index) and MACD to identify when momentum is building but not yet overextended. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply — which is why stop-losses are critical when riding these trends.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略的核心是追買近期價格與成交量均呈強勢的股票，其邏輯在於「強者恆強」——上漲中的資產往往具有慣性，短期內仍會繼續走高。交易者常借助相對強弱指數（RSI）和MACD等技術指標，判斷動能是否正在積累且尚未過熱。此策略的主要風險在於動能可能急速反轉，因此配合嚴格的止損機制尤為重要。
